message:
feat(config): WBQ/coalescer tunables, configurable attachment limit, WASM default URL

Write-behind queue (AM_WBQ_*): channel_capacity, drain_batch_cap,
flush_interval_ms, enqueue_timeout_ms.

Git coalescer (AM_COALESCER_*): flush_ms, max_batch_size, max_workers,
queue_cap.

Attachment limit: FALLBACK_MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES used only when
config.max_attachment_bytes is zero. store_raw_attachment() gains
max_bytes parameter.

WASM: extract DEFAULT_WS_URL constant with sync documentation.

Config: add list_contacts and product tool variants to default allowlist.
Simplify retention ignore patterns. Add LLM model warning when default used.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
